content.en:
Wow!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled, and soon arrived at the area where the ultimate space-time ancient treasure was located, and the top ancient demon-level powerhouses such as the Ao Retro Demon also came.

"There are a lot of ancient demon-level powerhouses!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

As for the Emperor List powerhouse, none of them came, after all, in this competition, the Emperor List powerhouse is not qualified to participate at all, otherwise the possibility of being killed is too great.

When it comes to the ultimate space-time ancient treasure, the top ancient demon-level powerhouses will definitely make a move, and when the time comes, the rule that the top ancient demon-level powerhouses are not allowed to do anything to the emperor list powerhouses may be broken.

Once this is done, the number one emperor may be killed.

Therefore, the strong people on the emperor list are very smart and will not come here.

Of course, the major fortresses will not notify those emperor list powerhouses, only the ancient demon-level powerhouses, and the ancient demon-level powerhouses who are still extremely powerful, will be notified.

"I've seen the Ao Retro Demon!"

Ye Tian shouted.

"Hmm!"

The Retro Demon nodded slightly.

On the side of the Aromu Fortress, in addition to him, there were hundreds of ancient demon-level powerhouses who came over, and each of them was extremely powerful.

Wow!

Another figure appeared, it was Amusha, and the other party also came.

"Amusha!"

Many Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were shocked when they saw Amusha break through to the Ancient Demon level.

Because Amusha had cultivated three form secret methods, and all of them were form secret methods created by others, he was judged to be almost unable to break through to the ancient demon level, but he didn't expect that he had broken through now.

Obviously, Amusha has created his own form secret method that suits him, and he can break through.

"Congratulations to Lord Amusha!"

An ancient demon-level powerhouse congratulated.

Amusha broke through to become an ancient demon-level powerhouse, her status is different, she herself is a descendant of an ultimate ancient demon, and her parents are both peak-level ancient demon-level powerhouses.

Moreover, Amusha is still the first to break through to the ancient demon level powerhouse on the emperor list, and as long as he breaks through to the peak ancient demon level powerhouse in the future, he will be an invincible existence under the ultimate ancient demon.

Therefore, Amusha's current status is still above the Ao Retro Demon, but now his cultivation is lower, not as good as the Ao Retro Demon.

Now.

In addition to the more than a hundred ancient demon-level powerhouses in the Aromu Fortress, many ancient demon-level powerhouses from other main departments also came one after another, but the reason why these ancient demon-level powerhouses have not yet snatched the ultimate space-time ancient treasure is that this ultimate space-time ancient treasure has not really been born, and at this time, snatching is undoubtedly not the best choice, not only will they be attacked by that ultimate space-time ancient treasure, but they will also make this ultimate space-time ancient treasure be damaged.

Therefore, these ancient demon-level powerhouses are still waiting.

"There are tens of thousands of ancient demon-level powerhouses who just appear here, and in my time, there are only a dozen ultimate supremes comparable to ancient demon-level powerhouses, and the era of the future generations is too end-of-the-law.!"

Ye Tian secretly sighed.

However, he was able to cross the ultimate time and space through the crystal of Arromu and descend to this era, this is the supreme opportunity!

He definitely has a chance to break through to the level of the Ultimate Ancient Demon.

As time passed, the day of the ultimate Space-Time Treasure was getting closer, and all sides were ready to move.

These tens of thousands of ancient demon-level powerhouses knew very well that once the ultimate space-time ancient treasure was born, they were afraid that it would attract unimaginable killings.

However, it was impossible for them to give up this ultimate space-time treasure.

It can be seen from the aura that it emits that the value of this ultimate space-time ancient treasure is too precious, if it weren't for the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse who couldn't enter the Huoxi space-time battlefield, otherwise those powerhouses would come in and snatch this ultimate space-time ancient treasure.

this day.

This ultimate space-time ancient treasure was completely born, and the terrifying ultimate space-time particle aura erupted.

"This ultimate space-time treasure is mine!"

The voice of a top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse came, and a blow shook hundreds of Ancient Demon-level powerhouses away, and its terrifying combat power made many Ancient Demon-level powerhouses tremble.

"It's him, the Erro Demon of the main Dom!"

A group of ancient demon-level powerhouses trembled, and the Erro Ancient Demon did not guard the Dom Fortress of the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield, but he was the second on the original emperor list, and he quickly broke through from an ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouse to a top-level ancient demon-level powerhouse.

Now, the Ero Ancient Demon should be about to break through to the peak of the Ancient Demon level powerhouse, he has already comprehended the ultimate rule realm of the Dacheng-level realm, a form secret method has been cultivated to at least the fourth form, and he has also comprehended the peak ultimate arcane.

It can be said that the strength of the Erro Ancient Demon far surpasses that of such powerhouses as the Ao Retro Demon, and it is obvious that he knows that the ultimate space-time ancient treasure was born here, so he came here from the main headquarters of Dom.

The Ao Ancient Demon was trembling, he was definitely not the opponent of the Ero Ancient Demon, even if the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse was suppressed, but when he encountered the Ero Ancient Demon, he had no power to resist.

"Ero Ancient Demon, just because you also want to snatch this top-notch ultimate space-time ancient treasure, dream!"

As soon as the words ended, a woman appeared, dressed in crimson armor, outlining the seductive curves of her perfect body.

And its crimson hair floated out, each strand of hair seemed to run through many time and space, and as it walked step by step, the endless ultimate particles behind it were annihilated, and its aura was terrifying to the extreme.

"The Red Maiden Ancient Demon!"

A group of ancient demon-level powerhouses trembled, this is the Red Maiden Ancient Demon of the main department of Aluo's mother, who used to be the number one on the emperor list, and her deterrence in the emperor list was no less than that of Amusa today, and she was also at the top of the ancient demon-level powerhouse.

It is rumored that the Red Maiden Ancient Demon has created two form secret methods by himself, and both of them have cultivated the fourth form consummation, and the power they exert is terrifying.

(Li Qianhao) And the peak ultimate arcane created by the Red Maiden Ancient Demon is not only two, but many, and she is also the daughter of an ultimate ancient demon, her blood is extremely powerful, and her body is terrifying.

"Red Maiden Ancient Demon, you're here too!"

The Erogus looked terrified.

He had fought against the Red Girl Ancient Demon, and he had fled for his life several times, and now although he was in the realm of a top Ancient Demon level powerhouse, he didn't think that the Red Girl Ancient Demon was the strength of the Red Girl Ancient Demon.

However, the stronger the strength, the more ruthlessly he was suppressed by the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and it was not easy for the Red Maiden Ancient Demon to kill him.

Immediately afterwards, a demonic top ancient demon from the major main departments descended, and top ancient demon-level powerhouses like the Ao Retro Demon could only be reduced to miscellaneous.

"If you want to snatch this top-notch space-time ancient treasure, whoever has the strength is whoever has it!"

The Red Maiden Ancient Demon said.

Immediately after, this group of strong men was killed.
